ops.title: P4 review verdict: piggyback-cc-interact change (accepted/rejected findings)
ops.body:
Two parallel gpt-5.6-sol xhigh codex lanes (correctness + security/integration) reviewed the full uncommitted diff; fable synthesized. 21 findings → 13 accepted and fixed, 4 rejected, plus overlaps.

**Accepted & fixed (2026-07-17):**
- Dedupe-by-event-id was impossible: neither `cco watch` (prints SSE `data` only) nor the channel notification (payload + `{type, subject_id}` meta) surfaces the event-log seq (`id:` field, sse.go `flushSince`). Fix: `messageEvent` gains a crypto/rand `id` inside the payload; brief now says dedupe by the message's `"id"` field.
- Root command injection via `$TMPDIR` in `ApplyManagedViaAdmin`: staging path interpolated unescaped into the admin-privileged `do shell script`. Fix: `adminScript` shell-quotes every path (`backend.ShellQuote`) + AppleScript-escapes the composed command; golden `TestAdminScriptQuoting`. Backport to cc-review filed as backlog task 56380e2.
- Same-second dev rebuilds tied (`mtime.Unix()`; `version.Newer` treats equal triples as not-newer) → `mtime.UnixNano()`.
- `channelsOffer` treated allowlist-presence as approval ignoring `channelsEnabled` → `ManagedHasEntry` now requires both.
- Non-array `allowedChannelPlugins` silently clobbered → hard error (`allowlist` helper).
- `setup-channels` mode flags not mutually exclusive → `MarkFlagsMutuallyExclusive`.
- Dead Windows branch in `ManagedSettingsPath` (repo ships darwin/linux) → deleted.
- `cco --version` printed raw unresolved `Version` → `Root()` sets `Version: buildVersion()`.
- spawn-smoke trio: verified eviction check moved after the daemon exists (lazy `status` doesn't cold-start), stale "(native)" schema text replaced (delivery boolean is explicitly enqueue-level), teardown now runs `$BIN stop` (a leftover 9999-versioned smoke daemon would outrank every release forever).
- README said bare `cco setup-channels` approves → `--apply`.

**Rejected (with reasons):**
- "MergeManaged drops the implicit default allowlist" — contradicts observed gating: absent key means no plugin channels; cc-review's live managed-settings has exactly this shape with other channels working.
- "Release 10000.0.0 would beat 9999-dev" — unreachable version number for this repo.
- "TOCTOU: concurrent managed-settings edit lost during admin prompt" — single-user one-shot op; guarding it is defensive coding.
- "Non-macOS staging files accumulate in tmp" — deliberate retention for the manual-install path.
